idle.title: Waiting
idle.description:
Create or join a lobby on the web
to get started.

stream.fullscreen_hint: Game in fullscreen and not listed? Use the Fullscreen tab to capture its whole screen.
stream.minimized_thumb: Minimized: the image will appear once you focus the game
stream.change_source_hint: Click the preview to change the source

waiting.waiting_host:
Waiting for the host
to start the race...

upload.quota_exhausted: Upload quota exhausted. Try again later
upload.blocking: You can start a new race once the upload finishes

autosplit.early_start_tooltip: Your timer looks already running. Reset before the race starts to avoid a penalty.

stop_modal.message_racing: You're mid-race. Stopping your stream now counts as a <red>forfeit</red> and you won't be able to rejoin this run.

header.clock_synced:
Server clock offset: {{offset}}
Click to resync
header.clock_unknown:
Server clock not synced
Click to sync
header.clock_cooldown:
Server clock offset: {{offset}}
Resync available in {{seconds}}s

server_unavailable.title: Server unavailable
server_unavailable.description:
Speedrace can't reach the server right now.
It may be down for maintenance or updating.
Try again in a few minutes.

banned.title: Account banned
banned.description:
Your account has been banned.
Contact an administrator if you think this is a mistake.

tray_hint.title: Still running
tray_hint.message:
Speedrace keeps running in the tray.
Click the tray icon to bring it back,
or use the close button to quit.
